name: goal-setter
description: Draft or activate compact Codex goals for verifiable long runs. Defines the result, evidence, constraints, stop rules, limited clarification, and only worthwhile extra review or separate threads.

interface.shortDescription: Codex goals with evidence and run rules
interface.longDescription: Turns a rough request into a compact /goal for Codex: expected result, evidence, constraints, stop rules, existing file reuse, and a long-run open-items loop when useful. It favors verification targets over rigid procedures and asks only when missing information would change the result, evidence, scope, validation, or risk.
defaultPrompt: Set a goal: define the expected result, evidence, constraints, and how Codex should run it.
Draft a Codex-ready goal for this task without activating it.
Shape this review or splittable work into a goal that keeps small work light and uses extra workers only when needed.
